title: What If...?
overview: Arata (16), the 3rd of 7 siblings and oldest son of the Shiunji family, dreams of a different life until...

title: Now What
overview: How will the siblings come to terms with the news?

title: For Now
overview: The gang heads to an amusement park to celebrate Kotono's birthday!

title: Respectively
overview: After Ouka's confession, Minami and Banri want to find out if anything has changed for Arata.

title: Perhaps
overview: Kotono's suspicions continue to grow. Meanwhile, Seiha has a theory and demands to test it out.

title: Now's the Time
overview: Minami's distractions catch up to her in the lead-up to her inter-highs.

title: Surely
overview: Where is Minami, and what comes of the tournament finals?

title: Since Then
overview: Minami deals with the aftermath, and Banri needs someone to help her.

title: Not Yet
overview: Ouka's gone AWOL, and the gang must figure out what's going on.

title: Finally
overview: Arata has found Ouka, but what next? And how will the rest of the family respond?

title: So Then
overview: The kids hit up their dad's summer villa in Karuizawa for a chill holiday, but things heat up for Arata!

title: Still
overview: As the family trip draws to a close, the siblings each come to terms with their bonds in their own way.
